name: Single-word answer constraint
description: Checks whether the model replies with exactly the requested single word.
prompt: Reply with only the single word: ready. No punctuation or extra text.
expected_behavior: The response should be exactly 'ready' and nothing else.

name: JSON object output constraint
description: Checks whether the model returns a valid JSON object with the requested keys.
prompt: Return a JSON object with exactly two keys: 'name' set to 'Ada' and 'age' set to 36. Do not wrap the JSON in code fences or include any prose.
expected_behavior: The response should be parseable JSON with keys name='Ada' and age=36.
